attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , DIST.UNIQUE_ID, DIST.GL_DATE , COALESCE(ENGLA_CRDT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995),
					COALESCE(ENGLA_DBT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995),DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID, DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS,COALESCE(DIST.SEQUENCE_ID,-999),COALESCE(DIST.TRXN_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN'))  
		+ SDCAKEY.MAX_VAL AS ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
, CASE WHEN DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN -7777 ELSE NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
, COALESCE(DIST.UNIQUE_ID, -999) AS  SK_LINE_REF_NUMBER                
, DIST.GL_DATE        
, COALESCE(DIST.SEQUENCE_ID,-999) AS SEQUENCE_ID                 
, COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999)              
, COALESCE(ENGLA_CRDT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  RU_CDT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
, COALESCE(ENGLA_DBT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS   RU_DBT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
, DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCT_CLASS_CD      
, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
, USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
, COALESCE(DIST.TRXN_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN')
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_ACCRUAL_DIST_ALL DIST 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_DBT 
ON (ENGLA_DBT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.DEBIT_CCID 
AND ENGLA_DBT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG')  
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_CRDT 
ON (ENGLA_CRDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CREDIT_CCID  
AND ENGLA_CRDT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG')  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL  
ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
AND NATL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
INNER JOIN ( SELECT  COALESCE(MAX(SMART.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_VAL  
			FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ACCRUED_REV_TRX SMART  ) SDCAKEY ON 1 = 1 
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ACCRUED_REV_TRX SMART   
				WHERE COALESCE(NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,-7777) = SMART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
                AND DIST.UNIQUE_ID = SMART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM 
				AND DIST.GL_DATE = SMART.GL_DT
				AND COALESCE(DIST.SEQUENCE_ID,-999)=SMART.SEQUENCE_ID
                AND COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999) = SMART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT 
				AND ENGLA_CRDT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = SMART.RU_CDT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
                AND ENGLA_DBT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY =  SMART.RU_DBT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
				AND DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS = SMART.ACCT_CLASS_CD
				AND COALESCE(DIST.TRXN_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN')=SMART.TRXN_SOURCE)

SELECT
SMART.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,    
CASE WHEN DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID IS NULL THEN -7777 ELSE NATL.AR_TRX_KEY END AS AR_TRX_KEY, 
CASE WHEN DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN -7777 ELSE NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
CASE WHEN DIST.TRXN_SOURCE IN 'BSFT-OPL' THEN DIST.ORDER_NUMBER ELSE DIST.WEB_ORDER_ID END AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID ,  
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN  COALESCE (NP_PAR.ITEM_KEY,-999)   
ELSE COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY,  -999)  END AS PRODUCT_KEY,
RFMTY.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  AS BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_CAL_CD , 
RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT,  
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
COALESCE(DIST.UNIQUE_ID, -999) AS  SK_LINE_REF_NUMBER, 
COALESCE (NP_PAR.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS  DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY,     
COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY, 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD, 
COALESCE (CAST(DIST.GL_DATE AS DATE) , DATE '3500-01-01') AS  GL_DT,
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN DIST.QUANTITY ELSE DIST.OA_QUANTITY END AS ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY,  
DIST.DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,    
COALESCE(CAST(DIST.GL_TRANSFER_DATE AS DATE),DATE '3500-01-01') GL_POSTED_DT,   
'CG' AS SS_CD ,      
'UNKNOWN' AS POB_TYPE_CD   ,  
COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999) AS OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT,  
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE' ELSE 'ATTRIBUTED' END AS ATTRIBUTION_CD   , /* RECHECK DERIVATION */
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ELSE DIST.OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME END AS ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME,  
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN DIST.RULE_START_DATE ELSE DIST.OA_RULE_START_DATE END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE,  
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN DIST.RULE_END_DATE ELSE DIST.OA_RULE_END_DATE END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DATE,  
COALESCE(DIST.AMOUNT,0) AS TSV_TRXL_AMT,
/*CASE WHEN DIST.GL_TRANSFER_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS  REV_RECOG_FLG, */
DIST.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE AS REV_RECOG_FLG,
COALESCE(DIST.ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID, -999) AS  SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
COALESCE(DIST.SEQUENCE_ID,-999) AS SEQUENCE_ID, 
COALESCE(DIST.OA_PERCENTAGE,100.00) AS OFFR_ATTR_PCT,  /*FOR STANDALONE KEEPING AS 100 AS OF NOW*/
DIST.APPLICATION_NAME AS BUSINESS_APPLICATION_NAME,
COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD, 
DIST.FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT,  
COALESCE(ENGLA_CREDIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS RU_CDT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,  
COALESCE(ENGLA_DEBIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS RU_DBT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,  
COALESCE(DIST.CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,0) AS RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,     
COALESCE(DIST.CREDIT_AMOUNT,0) AS RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT    , 
COALESCE(DIST.DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,0) AS RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,  
COALESCE(DIST.DEBIT_AMOUNT,0) AS RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT  , 
DIST.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG AS FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG,   
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,               
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,                
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
, COALESCE(DIST.TRXN_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(DIST.OFFER_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME/*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/ 
,COALESCE(DIST.PARTNER_HARDWARE_REV_FLG,'N') /*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/
,COALESCE(TIME_BOUND_CREDIT,'N') AS TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG  /* Added for PA credit Q2FY21 DEC*/
,COALESCE(FLEXUP_FLAG,'N') AS FLEXUP_RESV_TRANS_FLG /*Added as part of Q1FY22 Athena sep release */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_ACCRUAL_DIST_ALL DIST 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_DEBIT  ON (ENGLA_DEBIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.DEBIT_CCID 
	AND ENGLA_DEBIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')  
	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_CREDIT ON (ENGLA_CREDIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CREDIT_CCID 
	AND ENGLA_CREDIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')  
	
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   ON NSOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM = CAST(DIST.ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID  AS VARCHAR(30))
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_PAR ON(DIST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID =NP_PAR.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT) /*inner join bcoz both top and sub will have information*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON(DIST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID =NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT) /*left outer join bcoz only subsku will have info.*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  ON(EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = DIST.ORG_ID)      /*LEDGER_ID/ORG_ID*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB  ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID AND NSOB.SS_CODE='CG'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  RFMTY ON (DIST.FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER =  RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT) 
	AND CAST(DIST.GL_DATE AS DATE) <= RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 		
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
AND NATL.SS_CODE='CG' 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ACCRUED_REV_TRX SMART ON SMART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM = DIST.UNIQUE_ID  
        where SMART.GL_DT = DIST.GL_DATE    -- ** KK ** DEC 13TH
        AND SMART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = COALESCE(NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,-7777) 
        and SMART.SEQUENCE_ID=COALESCE(DIST.SEQUENCE_ID,-999)  
        AND SMART.RU_DBT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY  = ENGLA_DEBIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY   
        AND SMART.RU_CDT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY  = ENGLA_CREDIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY   
        AND SMART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT = COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999)  
        AND SMART.ACCT_CLASS_CD = DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS
